config.note: Input normalization verification: 8 ablation variants at L27 isolating input normalization, encoder normalization, norm-restoration, and base+delta parameterization.

variants.noc_baseline: Full NoC (enc norm + dec norm + norm-restoration)
variants.noc_enc_free: NoC without encoder norm (dec norm + norm-restoration)
variants.perfeature_bd_no_enc_norm: Per-feature base+delta, no enc norm, with norm-restoration

predictions.standard_inputnorm: Should kill features (isolates input norm as trigger)
predictions.noc_enc_free: Should survive if norm-restoration is sufficient
predictions.perfeature_bd_no_enc_norm: Key test: norm-restoration as enc norm substitute for per-feature
